message:
fix: bd init fails in directories starting with a dot

Strip leading dots from prefix to prevent invalid Dolt database names
(e.g. '.claude' -> 'bd_.claude'). Also sanitize dots to underscores
in database name generation.

PR: https://github.com/steveyegge/beads/pull/2558
Co-authored-by: matt wilkie <maphew@users.noreply.github.com>
